children.label: Pillar E
ghg_emissions (w=0.3, credit=0.7)
[ASSERTED] Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions fell by 81.6% in 2024 compared to the 2020 baselin
children.source_sentence: Reflecting our commitment to decarbonise our operations, our Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions have fallen by 81.6% in 2024, compared to our 2020 baseline, and 39.6% year-on-year.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel contributed more than 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through various projects
children.source_sentence: In 2024, we contributed more than 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through various Keppel projects, including the waste-to-energy plant that we operate in Qatar, the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore, the operation of our district cooling systems in Singapore, as well as our Green Mark and LEED-certified projects.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel reduced Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions by 81.6% from the 2020 baseline.
children.source_sentence: 81.6% Reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions from 2020 baseline achieved by operations in Singapore and overseas.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel contributed to over 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through its waste-to-energ
children.source_sentence: >1m tCO2e In avoided emissions from the waste-to-energy plant operated by Keppel in Qatar, the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore, our district cooling systems in Singapore, as well as Green Mark or LEED-certified buildings and data centres.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel achieved a 97% reduction in Scope 1 emissions from the 2020 baseline.
children.source_sentence: 97% Reduction in Scope 1 emissions from 2020 baseline.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel committed to halving its Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030 compared to 2020 levels an
children.source_sentence: Committed to halve Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030, compared to 2020 levels, and achieve net zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel conducted quantitative analysis of climate-related transition risks and opportuniti
children.source_sentence: Conducted quantitative analysis of impact of climate-related transition risks and opportunities on Keppel, focusing on impact of higher carbon taxes and higher electricity prices.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Environmental sustainability targets, including carbon emissions reduction, accounted for
children.source_sentence: Environmental sustainability targets, including carbon emissions reduction, accounted for 5% of the Company’s performance scorecard.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.source_sentence: training for suppliers on ESG issues, including health and safety, and carbon management.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel’s operations emit greenhouse gases that contribute to climate change, but it also p
children.source_sentence: Keppel’s operations emit greenhouse gases that contribute to climate change. At the same time, Keppel provides diverse solutions that contribute to decarbonisation and help our customers and communities reduce or avoid carbon emissions.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel has committed to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions and is tracking and reporting on al
children.source_sentence: Keppel has committed to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions, and is also tracking and reporting on all relevant categories of Scope 3 emissions.

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 emissions fell by 81.6% in 2024 compared to the 2020 baseline.
children.source_sentence: Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 emissions fell by 81.6% in 2024 compared to our 2020 baseline, and 39.6% year-on-year.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] We also minimise our impact on the environment by reducing carbon emissions, energy consum
children.source_sentence: We also minimise our impact on the environment by reducing carbon emissions, energy consumption, water consumption and waste generation, avoiding pollution and preserving biodiversity in our operations.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] We also collaborate with UN Global Compact Network Singapore to provide carbon management
children.source_sentence: We also collaborate with UN Global Compact Network Singapore to provide carbon management training for our suppliers, especially those from small- and medium-sized enterprises, to enhance sustainability performance within our supply chain.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.source_sentence: Zero Fatalities Across global operations.

children.label: [ASSERTED] We are committed to diversity, employee well-being, workplace health and safety, and inves
children.source_sentence: We are committed to diversity, employee well-being, workplace health and safety, and investing in the training and development of our employees to help them reach their full potential.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) meets at least four times a year.
children.source_sentence: The BSSC meets at least four times a year.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The BSSC’s roles include monitoring international sustainability-related trends and develo
children.source_sentence: Its roles include monitoring international sustainability-related trends and developments, reviewing the Company’s sustainability strategy, ensuring that Keppel has in place an effective sustainability governance structure, overseeing the adoption of and progress towards the Company’s sustainability goals, reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities, and overseeing the Company’s health, safety, and environmental performance, among others.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The BSSC also makes regular visits to Keppel’s projects and work sites, including interact
children.source_sentence: The BSSC also makes regular visits to Keppel’s projects and work sites, including interacting with our contractors and suppliers, to monitor and better understand Keppel’s sustainability and safety performance.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) Council builds industry capabilities to better manag
children.source_sentence: • Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) Council to build industry capabilities to better manage WSH and promote safety and health at work;
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel’s material ESG factors include Climate Action and Environmental Management, Corpora
children.source_sentence: The six material ESG factors, namely, Climate Change and Environmental Management, Corporate Governance and Risk Management, Supply Chain Management, Human Capital Management, Health and Safety, as well as Contribution to Society, were grouped under the three pillars of Environmental Stewardship, Responsible Business, as well as People and Community, which correspond with the environmental, governance and social aspects of sustainability respectively.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel’s Zero Fatality Strategy and HSE training for contractors and their employees aim t
children.source_sentence: Keppel has put in place a Zero Fatality Strategy, and provides HSE training for contractors and their employees at its Safety Awareness Centres in Singapore and overseas, which help to raise industry HSE standards, eliminate or reduce risks at work and strengthen safety culture across our supply chain.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel’s HSE training and initiatives contributed to improved safety awareness and perform
children.source_sentence: The HSE training and other initiatives contributed to improved safety awareness and performance among contractors and their employees, who were trained on topics such as working at height, lifting procedures, working within confined spaces, proper use of equipment and scaffold erection.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The number of fatalities for contractors’ workforce improved from two in 2022 to zero in 2
children.source_sentence: The number of fatalities for contractors’ workforce improved from two in 2022 to zero in 2023 and 2024.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel’s operations involve exposure to health and safety risks.
children.source_sentence: Keppel’s operations involve exposure to health and safety risks.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] HSE risk has been identified as one of the key non-financial risks which is monitored by t
children.source_sentence: HSE risk has been identified as one of the key non-financial risks which is monitored by the Board Risk Committee under Keppel’s Enterprise Risk Management Framework, so as to prevent any safety breaches or lapses in all sites where Keppel operates that could result in direct or indirect impact on our internal and external stakeholders, including our employees, contractors, suppliers and customers.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] Keppel is committed to providing a safe and healthy working environment, building a proact
children.source_sentence: Keppel is committed to providing a safe and healthy working environment, building a proactive safety culture, and continually improving HSE standards both in our operations and the broader community.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The Company’s leadership sets the tone and leads by example in strengthening our safety cu
children.source_sentence: The Company’s leadership sets the tone and leads by example in strengthening our safety culture.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] We ensure high safety standards for our products and services to safeguard customer health
children.source_sentence: We ensure high safety standards for our products and services to safeguard customer health and safety.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] This includes applying Design for Safety guidelines to all major development projects in S
children.source_sentence: This includes applying Design for Safety guidelines to all major development projects in Singapore and overseas to ensure that work can be executed safely not only during the construction stage, but also during the operations and maintenance stages.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

children.label: [ASSERTED] The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) provides greater focus on sustainabil
children.source_sentence: The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) provides greater focus on sustainability matters, including reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing, and managing climate-related risks and opportunities across the four pillars of governance, strategy, risk management, and metrics and targets, as well as related reporting.
children.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

claims.text: Keppel contributed more than 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through various projects in 2024.

claims.text: The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) meets at least four times a year.
claims.source_sentence: The BSSC meets at least four times a year.
claims.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

claims.text: The BSSC’s roles include monitoring international sustainability-related trends and developments, reviewing the Company’s sustainability strategy, ensuring that Keppel has in place an effective sustainability governance structure, overseeing the adoption of and progress towards the Company’s sustainability goals, reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities, and overseeing the Company’s health, safety, and environmental performance, among others.
claims.source_sentence: Its roles include monitoring international sustainability-related trends and developments, reviewing the Company’s sustainability strategy, ensuring that Keppel has in place an effective sustainability governance structure, overseeing the adoption of and progress towards the Company’s sustainability goals, reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities, and overseeing the Company’s health, safety, and environmental performance, among others.
claims.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

claims.text: The BSSC also makes regular visits to Keppel’s projects and work sites, including interacting with our contractors and suppliers, to monitor and better understand Keppel’s sustainability and safety performance.

claims.text: Keppel’s material ESG factors include Climate Action and Environmental Management, Corporate Governance and Risk Management, Supply Chain Management, Human Capital Management, Health and Safety, and Contribution to Society.
claims.source_sentence: The six material ESG factors, namely, Climate Change and Environmental Management, Corporate Governance and Risk Management, Supply Chain Management, Human Capital Management, Health and Safety, as well as Contribution to Society, were grouped under the three pillars of Environmental Stewardship, Responsible Business, as well as People and Community, which correspond with the environmental, governance and social aspects of sustainability respectively.

claims.text: HSE risk has been identified as one of the key non-financial risks which is monitored by the Board Risk Committee under Keppel’s Enterprise Risk Management Framework, so as to prevent any safety breaches or lapses in all sites where Keppel operates that could result in direct or indirect impact on our internal and external stakeholders, including our employees, contractors, suppliers and customers.
